title: Option for "ALWAYS VISIBLE" page header in Monday
excerpt: When you have lots of entries in your groups, and scroll down the list … the Page Header with View Selection and Search/Filter/sort options … goes away, and you need to scroll up to the top again to access this functiona…

posts.author: nmalexandersen (Nils Morten Alexandersen)
posts.cookedHtml:
When you have lots of entries in your groups, and scroll down the list … the Page Header with View Selection and Search/Filter/sort options … goes away, and you need to scroll up to the top again to access this functionality.

This han been the nr 1 complaint from users the last 2 weeks … and I guess it could be easily fixed by adding a “ALWAYS VISIBLE” option to the Top part of the page.

kind of like the PIN logic you have for Items in groups, only this time Vertical
Hope for a quick fix

Regards Nils

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed.

Feel free to add your vote to this previous similar feature request too
https://community.monday.com/t/sticky-header-on-boards/9778

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, voted a long time ago. Small enhancement but huge impact for end users.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Eltjo:

Small enhancement but huge impact for end users.

Yep @Eltjo. Curious why there’s never been any action on this.

“Pin columns” was a cool addition but we’re still waiting for the far-more-useful “Pin header”.

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
I do take posts like this into account, and I totally get it that there are more stakeholders than only the community. But there is a lot small enhancement requests in the community whereof I think if Monday would devote one or two sprints to specifically those items, the Monday community and it’s active people would be insanely happy. At least I would be.

To quote a view of my favourites small enhancements

Auto-ID column (more dynamic) Feature requests
Let me share a little secret about the AutoID Column, call it an Easter Egg There might be situations that you want AutoID to fill the leftmost (name) column on your board. To do that configure AutoID filling a temporary text column (you can add the column during the configuration) and delete the new column after AutoID is configured. AutoID will recognize that the output column has been deleted and puts the generated AutoID in the left most (name) column. You can even re-config…
Visual indication on each pulse that there is information in an Info Box + checklists in Info Boxes Feature requests
Request a visual indicator on each pulse that there is information in an info box. Looking at a pulse in a board, there is currently no way to know there is more information in that task without clicking several times into it. [image]
Collapse Board Description Feature requests
I’ve searched through many topics here regarding the use of the Board Description area that is immediately under the Board Title. However, I can’t see anywhere that the following issue is mentioned. If this is a duplicate, I apologise. We have a number of boards that include some extensive text descriptions. Some of these descriptions are truncated and display the “Read More” button. The “Read More” button works well for these instances. However, could we please have a corresponding “Colla…
Start and end time in date column Feature requests
As soon as an start time is selected, and the column is in sync with your calendar it shows 1 hour in the calendar. This, in some cases can work wuite confusing, because this specific item (pulse) can represent a workshop of 3 hours. Being able to select an end time would solve that. [image]

https://community.monday.com/t/my-week-in-the-bolt-switch/576

Show Timeline tasks in My Week Feature requests
Currently in My Week tasks only appear on the last day that is set in a timeline task. It would be very helpful if a task is visible on My Week from the timeline start date up to and including the timeline end date. The most simple example is the use of the vacations board, a three week vacation for a colleague only shows up on My Week on the last week. The current setup means that tasks that need to be done in a certain period now only show up on the due date, not the start date.
Image preview in File Column & Kanban View Feature requests
I think that having a column that could display images (jpg, gif, png, tiff) would be very helpful for creative departments. In the main table view, it would be a thumbnail. The power would be that in a kanban board style, it could be a main identifier for the pulse. This could also lead to a new gallery style view that would have people be able to see all the images in one location.
Link-Column with a Local Link (not Web-Link) Feature requests
Hi everyone, Our Issue: We have many tasks that are associated with a large number of files. Those files are all saved on a local network-share. I want to be able to easily access that folder in Monday. It is not practical to attach every single file to a task (too many files, also they have to be accessible by other applications). I’d prefer to have a simple link to our local path, to be opened with Windows Explorer. The available “Link-column” does not work, as every link generated will star…
Multiple links in link column Feature requests
We add links in the Link column to external tools (Miro for workflows for example) and Google documents to give context to that specific item, but I do not want to add multiple columns whenever there are multiple links to add. So it would be great to be able to add multiple Links into the column. After clicking on this column cell which has multiple links in it, a dropdown could show with all the named links. Awesome! [Multiple links in Link column] Related: Link-Column with a…

Not small but a real time saver:

Set Board as MASTER Board (Column Structure, Permissions, and Automations Applied Across Linked Boards) Feature requests
Multiple boards that require the same setup are difficult to manage as columns are added/updated, permissions change, automations set up. Although there is a “save as a template” feature, each board still has to be updated manually if a change is made to the template or an existing board. Requested feature is to have the ability to set a Board as MASTER board. Other boards can be linked to the MASTER board so any structure, permission, or automation changes are applied across all linked boards. …

posts.author: mdhilden (Hilden)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, but if the header section takes up too much space, it’ll just make you have to scroll down further to see what you’re looking for. If you could just keep the top line and the line with the views on it at the top of the page, I don’t think we need the description of the board up there all the time.

posts.author: nmalexandersen (Nils Morten Alexandersen)
posts.cookedHtml: good idea the main thing is to have easy access when the boards gets big, and you are way down the list …

posts.author: emilydunlop (Emily Dunlop)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree - we really need this as well.
